sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76246" key="o)xloa/reskos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀχλοάρεσκος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n76246.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mob-flatterer</tr_>, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0658.tlg001:34:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
